scripts.start:qt6: bun run build:qt6 && bun run --cwd apps/desktop/qt6 start
scripts.build: bun run build:contracts && bun run --cwd apps/web build && bun run --cwd apps/server build && bun run --cwd apps/desktop/tauri build
scripts.build:desktop: bun run build:contracts && bun run --cwd apps/web build && bun run --cwd apps/server build && bun run --cwd apps/desktop/tauri build
scripts.build:qt6: bun run build:contracts && bun run --cwd apps/web build && bun run --cwd apps/server build && bun run --cwd apps/desktop/qt6 build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/contracts typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/server typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/desktop/tauri typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/contracts test && bun run --cwd packages/shared test && bun run --cwd apps/server test && bun run --cwd apps/web test && bun run --cwd apps/desktop/tauri test
scripts.build:desktop:no-bundle: bun run build:contracts && bun run --cwd apps/web build && bun run --cwd apps/server build && bun run --cwd apps/desktop/tauri build:no-bundle
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules apps/desktop/node_modules apps/desktop/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/dist apps/desktop/tauri/src-tauri/target apps/desktop/qt6/build
